name: Plasmid Miniprep (Alkaline Lysis)

components.name: 3. 250 µL Buffer P2 裂解 (颠倒混匀)
4. 350 µL Buffer P3 中和 (颠倒混匀)
7. 加 0.7 倍体积异丙醇沉淀
10. 风干 → 30–50 µL TE/H₂O 溶解

notes.en: Dilute to 1× before use. Classic alkaline lysis method. Yields 5–20 µg from 3 mL overnight culture. A260/280 should be 1.8–2.0 for pure DNA.
notes.zh: 经典碱裂解法。3 mL 过夜培养物可获 5–20 µg 质粒 DNA。A260/280 应为 1.8–2.0。如需更高纯度，使用商业柱提试剂盒。

ref: Birnboim & Doly (1979) Nucleic Acids Res 7:1513–1523; Sambrook & Russell (2001)

materials.name: Overnight bacterial culture (2–5 mL in LB + antibiotic)

usage.en: Isolate small-scale plasmid DNA from E. coli cultures using alkaline lysis.
usage.zh: 碱裂解法小量提取大肠杆菌质粒 DNA。

briefSteps.en: Pellet bacteria → resuspend in P1 → lyse with P2 → neutralize with P3 → centrifuge → precipitate DNA with isopropanol → wash with 70% EtOH → air-dry → dissolve in TE
briefSteps.zh: 离心收菌 → P1 重悬 → P2 碱裂解 → P3 中和 → 离心 → 异丙醇沉淀 DNA → 70% 乙醇洗涤 → 风干 → TE 溶解

detailedSteps.en: Day 1: Inoculate a single colony into 3–5 mL LB + antibiotic; grow at 37°C, 225 rpm for 12–16 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 第1天：挑单克隆接种至 3–5 mL LB + 抗生素，37°C、225 rpm 过夜培养 12–16 h。

detailedSteps.en: Day 2 — Transfer 1.5–2 mL overnight culture to a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge at 6,000×g for 2 min; discard supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 第2天 — 取 1.5–2 mL 过夜菌液至 1.5 mL 离心管，6,000×g 离心 2 min，弃上清。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend the bacterial pellet completely in 250 µL ice-cold Buffer P1 (50 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0, 10 mM EDTA, 100 µg/mL RNase A) by pipetting until no clumps remain.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 250 µL 冰冷 Buffer P1（50 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0、10 mM EDTA、100 µg/mL RNase A）彻底重悬菌体至无颗粒。

detailedSteps.en: Add 250 µL Buffer P2 (0.2 M NaOH, 1% SDS); invert tube 4–6 times gently. Incubate at room temperature for exactly 2–3 min until solution clears. Do NOT vortex.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 250 µL Buffer P2（0.2 M NaOH、1% SDS），轻柔颠倒混匀 4–6 次，室温孵育 2–3 min 至溶液变清亮，切勿涡旋。

detailedSteps.en: Add 350 µL Buffer P3 (3 M potassium acetate, pH 5.5); immediately invert 4–6 times until white precipitate forms. Place on ice for 5 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 350 µL Buffer P3（3 M 乙酸钾，pH 5.5），立即颠倒混匀 4–6 次至白色絮状沉淀形成，冰浴 5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 13,000×g for 10 min at room temperature to pellet cell debris and precipitated proteins/genomic DNA.
detailedSteps.zh: 13,000×g 室温离心 10 min，沉淀细胞碎片及蛋白质/基因组 DNA。

detailedSteps.en: Carefully transfer the clear supernatant to a new 1.5 mL tube, avoiding the white pellet.
detailedSteps.zh: 小心吸取上清液至新的 1.5 mL 离心管，避免触碰白色沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Add 0.7 volumes (~700 µL) of room-temperature isopropanol to the supernatant; mix by inverting 10 times.
detailedSteps.zh: 向上清中加入 0.7 倍体积（约 700 µL）室温异丙醇，颠倒混匀 10 次。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 13,000×g for 15 min at room temperature; carefully discard the supernatant without disturbing the DNA pellet.
detailedSteps.zh: 13,000×g 室温离心 15 min，小心弃去上清，避免扰动 DNA 沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Wash the pellet with 500 µL of 70% ethanol; centrifuge at 13,000×g for 5 min and discard supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 500 µL 70% 乙醇洗涤沉淀，13,000×g 离心 5 min，弃上清。

detailedSteps.en: Air-dry the pellet for 5–10 min at room temperature (or 37°C for 3 min) until no ethanol odor remains. Do not over-dry.
detailedSteps.zh: 室温风干 5–10 min（或 37°C 3 min）至乙醇气味消失，勿过度干燥。

detailedSteps.en: Dissolve the pellet in 30–50 µL TE buffer (pH 8.0) or nuclease-free water. Quantify by NanoDrop; A260/280 should be 1.8–2.0.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 30–50 µL TE 缓冲液（pH 8.0）或无核酸酶水溶解沉淀，NanoDrop 定量，A260/280 应为 1.8–2.0。

note.en: Bacterial pellet can be frozen at −20°C for up to 1 month before continuing.
note.zh: 菌体沉淀可 −20°C 冻存最多 1 个月后继续操作。

note.en: Purified plasmid DNA can be stored at −20°C for years or at 4°C for several months.
note.zh: 纯化的质粒 DNA 可 −20°C 保存多年，或 4°C 保存数月。
